title: dactyloctenium capitatum
intro: Dactyloctenium capitatum, also known as Buffalo Grass or Dactyloctenium, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dactyloctenium capitatum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Dactyloctenium capitatum can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
